name: Seeneyu Mirror Mode
description: Private real-time body-language coaching during Zoom / Meet / Teams. All processing happens on your device.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src http://localhost:3000 https://seeneyu.vercel.app https://seeneyu.com https://www.seeneyu.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net
